productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Infused PreRoll - Sticky Melon - Gusherlicious - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Gusherlicious, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a light, refreshing melon flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
